creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
In X server 1.14.7, X server has listened on tcp 6000 port by default. But after update to 1.17.2, X server has no longer lisened on tcp port. Then, if user starts his/her own .xinit scripts with setting DISPLAY as hostname:n style, cliants in script cannot connect to X server, so exit X session soon.

I think this change of behavior is not a bug, but I think it is better to mention it in ports UPDATING file.
